text:
Sage's Aquamarine (賢者のアクアマリン) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Sage's Aquamarine 賢者のアクアマリン - This card when cast, allows the user to have many different intelligent friends to keep you company. They are there to provide you with knowledge. The friendships you make with these people will become unbreakable and lasts for their entire lives!

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.074 :: 賢者のアクアマリン 
所有している者は、一生を通して付き合うことができる、知性豊かな友人を何人も得るだろう。
|-
![Eng]
|No.074 :: Sage's Aquamarine 
The owner, will be able to get on through life, with friends rich in intelligence.
|}
